data.body:
[operator-attested] Landed on main via Gerrit change 888
(https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/888), status MERGED.

Vote record (queried via Gerrit REST as RebarBotNava):
- LLM-Review +1 by rebar-review-bot
- Verified +1 by rebar-ci-bot
- unresolved_comment_count: 0; submittable: true

Merged current_revision = bd7572a9ef4f49567d56981c9576115f90914926, which is the
worktree HEAD (Gerrit fast-forward submit, no rebase). Commit carries
`rebar-ticket: 2e02-fd51-5e53-41a3`. Diff is exactly the two pin lines in
pyproject.toml (zizmor==1.28.0, ruff==0.15.22); `make lint` and `make typecheck`
passed locally in the worktree venv with no ruff-format churn.
